content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/database.py:1	from sqlalchemy import create_engine2	from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base3	from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker4	5	SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./sql_app.db"6	7	engine = create_engine(8	    SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False}9	)10	SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)11	12	Base = declarative_base()
